sections.paragraph:
Original: טוּב

Transliteration: ṭûb

Phonetic: toob

BDB Definition:

  1. goods, good things, goodness
    1. good things
    2. goods, property
    3. fairness, beauty, joy, prosperity, goodness (abstract)
    4. goodness (of taste, discernment)
    5. goodness (of God) (abstract)

Origin: from H2895

TWOT entry: 793b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
